title: malus domestica var. micromalus
intro: Malus domestica var. micromalus, also known as the dwarf crabapple, is a variety of the Malus domestica plant, characterized by its compact growth habit and small fruit. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus domestica var. micromalus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
